title: DirtisOP
description: "Dirt drops OP items for fast and fun Minecraft gameplay."
body:
![Dirt drop items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f815be11d0fbab2363b473a37485d0778614fb83.webp)

"This datapack makes dirt extremely overpowered. Breaking dirt can drop valuable and OP items, turning the most common block into a powerful resource. It’s perfect for fun survival worlds, challenges, and chaotic gameplay where progression is fast and exciting."
